---
name: Protocol change
about: Propose a change to docs/PROTOCOL.md
title: ''
labels:
  - protocol
assignees: []
---

> While Vincent has a single maintainer (phase 1), protocol changes are made directly with a changeset; this template is for future contributors when phase 2 governance applies.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem or gap does it address?

## Affected PROTOCOL.md sections

List section numbers and titles (e.g., 4.2 Claim types, 7.2 Rules).

## schemaVersion impact

Does this require a new `schemaVersion`? If yes, describe the migration. If no, explain why the wire format is unchanged.

## Backward compatibility

How do existing claims, manifests, epochs, and clients behave after this change? What breaks, and what remains readable?

## Additional context

Links to prior discussion, implementations, or competing proposals.
